title: Forgotten Civilizations
description: Improve minecraft's exploration with ruins of long gone civilizations.
body:
This mod adds ruins of long gone civilizations for now roman ruins, but there will be more in the future, 2 variations of aqueducts and 2 variations of "colosseums". Great for medieval modpacks, since in this period, roman ruins were everywhere.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f14fc212bc18f07978d11d2a7f02ee6363bb023_0.webp)![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d20a5b28024630d79cfa1321ed56a7e127633bb_0.webp)![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cc102a22c4a93b2648d0ce54221dcb22bcfe8b3_0.webp)![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e4b2435d6bbfd86aab672b3356dd018d0dbd611_0.webp)
